inputs.name: packageName
inputs.description: Name of the package for which to retrieve assets.

inputs.name: assetName
inputs.description: Fully qualified name of the asset from which to retrieve asset information.

outputs.name: asset
outputs.description: The list of information about the specified asset.

inputs.name: packageName
inputs.description: Name of the package from which to retrieve assets.

inputs.name: assetType
inputs.description: Optional. A comma-separated list of asset types from which to retrieve information. Asset types include Flow Service, Java Service, Document Type, etc. To retrieve a list of all asset types, call the GET/admin/assettype operation in the Integration Server Administrator API.

inputs.name: visible
inputs.description: Optional. Flag indicating whether the service retrieves dependent assets. Set to: true to retrieve assets from other packages when flagged as visible. false to not retrieve assets from other packages. Note: Use IBM webMethods.io Integration to specify whether or not an asset can be referenced from outside the package.

inputs.name: favorite
inputs.description: Optional. Flag indicating whether the service retrieves assets that are marked as favorite. Set to: true to retrieve the assets that are marked as a favorite. false to retrieve the assets that are not marked as a favorite. Note: Use IBM webMethods.io Integration to mark an asset as a favorite.

inputs.name: deprecated
inputs.description: Optional. Flag indicating whether the service retrieves assets that are marked as deprecated. Set to: true to retrieve assets that are marked as deprecated. false to retrieve assets that are not marked as deprecated. Note: Use IBM webMethods.io Integration to mark an asset as deprecated.

inputs.name: displayName
inputs.description: Optional. Local name for the asset for which to retrieve information.

inputs.name: since
inputs.description: Optional. Version of the package from which to retrieve information. Note: Use IBM webMethods.io Integration to specify the version of the package.

inputs.name: tag
inputs.description: Optional. Tag for which to filter assets. Service results only include assets with the specified tag. You can specify only one tag. Note: Use IBM webMethods.io Integration to assign tags to assets.

outputs.name: packageName
outputs.description: List of packages with assets that meet the input criteria.

inputs.name: packages
inputs.description: Optional. Names of the packages for which you want to get the checksum of each asset in the package. A package must be enabled and loaded for Integration Server to get checksums for the assets. If a package is partially loaded, Integration Server gets checksums for the loaded assets only. You must specify a value for packages or assets . If you specify a value for both packages and assets , Integration Server uses the packages value and ignores assets . If you specify neither, the pub.assets:getChecksums service ends with an exception.

inputs.name: assets
inputs.description: Optional. List of the fully qualified names of the specific assets for which you want to get the checksum. You must specify a value for packages or assets. If you specify a value for both packages and assets , Integration Server uses the packages value and ignores assets . If you specify neither, the pub.assets:getChecksums service ends with an exception.

outputs.name: checksums
outputs.description: List of checksums for the assets in the specified packages or the specified assets.

inputs.name: packageName
inputs.description: Name of the package from which to retrieve global variable usage information.

inputs.name: keys
inputs.description: Optional. A list of global variables from which you want to retrieve information. If keys are not provided, the service returns all the global variables used in the package.

outputs.name: result
outputs.description: The list of global variables in a package.

inputs.name: packageList
inputs.description: A package or a list of packages for which you want to view APIs.

outputs.name: packages
outputs.description: The list of packages that contains APIs.

inputs.name: packageName
inputs.description: Name of the package from which to retrieve asset information.

inputs.name: assetType
inputs.description: Optional. A list of asset types you want to retrieve information. Asset types include Flow Service, Java Service, Document Type, etc.

inputs.name: includeDependency
inputs.description: Optional. Specifies whether or not to include a list of assets that depend on or reference assets in the package in the service results. Set to: true to generate a list of dependencies or references for each asset. false to skip generating the list of dependents and references assets. The dependents , references , dependentsError , and referencesError output parameters are not returned. This is the default setting.
